label: High ICP — Full Enrichment
expected_behavior: ICP score ~85, deep search triggered, enrichment triggered, 3 personalization hooks returned

label: Medium ICP — Enrichment Triggered
expected_behavior: ICP score ~68, standard search only, enrichment triggered (score > 60), email found

label: Low ICP — No Enrichment (Credit Saved)
expected_behavior: ICP score ~15, only 1 standard search call, no enrichment, credits saved
